title: ResultsLedger
description: The CANONICAL AUDITED RESULTS LEDGER: the single machine-readable source of truth for every hypothesis the program ran. Each entry pairs the RAW per-domain verdict (parsed from output/edgehunt-*/SUMMARY.md) with the AUDITED verdict (the scientificVerdict after the two-layer adversarial audit in output/edgehunt-audit/, output/edgehunt-audit-nb/, output/edgehunt-deepen/). When rawVerdict != auditedVerdict an auditOverrideReason is REQUIRED, so every flip is explained and machine-checkable. The audited headline of this ledger is the authoritative count; in any conflict with a human-readable doc, the ledger wins. The top-level value is an ARRAY of entries.

id.description: Stable hypothesis / strategy identifier, e.g. D5-08, Q9-LOWVOL, O3-NVTS, D1-LS-DONCH.

domain.description: Source domain code, derived from the ledger directory (e.g. D1, D5, quant, onchain2, requeue, consensus).

claimType.description: Optional claim taxonomy, e.g. time-series-timing, cross-sectional, carry, volatility-premium, calendar, on-chain, macro, microstructure.

rawVerdict.description: The RAW verdict as written in the per-domain output/edgehunt-*/SUMMARY.md verdict table, BEFORE the cross-domain adversarial audit.

auditedVerdict.description: The audited scientificVerdict: the canonical final label after the two-layer adversarial audit. SURVIVE = every gate passes. PROMISING = passes the core economic gates but trips a multiple-testing / Deflated-Sharpe gate (structure real, honest-N magnitude significance not). KILL = fails a core economic gate. DEFERRED = needs paid/forward data unavailable at $0. INDETERMINATE = ran but too weak/seed-sensitive to label.

bindingGate.description: The id of the FIRST gate that bound the audited verdict, or null when every gate passed (SURVIVE) or the verdict is DEFERRED (never run).

honestN.description: The HONEST N — the true number of distinct configs searched, used to deflate. Null when not applicable (e.g. DEFERRED / never run).

surrogateP.description: The family-wise-correct surrogate / placebo p-value at the audited honest N. Null when no surrogate was scored.

monthlyAt100k.description: Realistic net-of-cost monthly P&L in USD at $100k notional. Null when no deployable edge (most KILLs) so projecting a number would be dishonest.

lastAudit.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the most recent audit that set this entry's audited verdict.

auditOverrideReason.description: REQUIRED iff rawVerdict != auditedVerdict: a one-line reason the audit flipped the raw label (enforced by the validator, not by JSON Schema alone).

artifactPath.description: Optional repo-relative path to the source artifact (SUMMARY.md / result JSON). Never an absolute or machine-local path.
